title: PaperBench Code-Dev — Stochastic Interpolants 1論文での実証
summary: 「生成 → 反復改善」のループで 43.2% → 67.5% → 94.5%。単一論文ではあるが SOTA を超える結果を達成。

improved: Paper analysis：(Stage 1): Successfully extracted claims, architecture details, hyperparameters, code references
Hyperparameter matching：(Stages 4-5 of rubric): Adam optimizer, lr=2e-4, StepLR gamma=0.99/1000 steps, grad clip 10000, U-Net architecture params (dim_mults, attention heads, etc.) - all scored 100%
Core framework：Stochastic interpolant + ODE sampling with torchdiffeq Dopri5 solver
Training loop structure：Proper loss computation framework, time sampling U(0,1)
failed: Data source：Used CIFAR-10 instead of ImageNet (0/100 on dataset nodes)
External dependencies：Did not use lucidrain's denoising-diffusion-pytorch repo (0/100)
Task-specific implementation：Inpainting masking strategy completely wrong (pixel-wise instead of 64-tile, wrong mask formula)
Dependent coupling：The core contribution of the paper was poorly implemented (generic noise correlation instead of proper masked image coupling)
Sampling procedure：Used ODE solve instead of the explicit Euler steps as described in Algorithm 2
Training steps：Epoch-based instead of step-based (requirement: 200,000 gradient steps)
Class conditioning：Not implemented (uniform channel fill with class value)

improved: ImageNet dataset access：Now uses HuggingFace datasets (score: 0 -> 100)
Masking strategy：Implemented 64-tile masking with p=0.3 (mostly fixed)
Coupling formula：Correct x_0 = mask * x_1 + (1-mask) * noise
Step-based training：Now trains for 200,000 gradient steps
Class conditioning：Added uniform channel with class value
Both models：Implemented Dependent Coupling and Uncoupled Interpolant
failed: lucidrain's U-Net：Still not imported from the external repo (score: 0)
Dopri solver：Forward Euler used instead (previous iteration had it, lost in rewrite)
Gradient clip value：Set to 1.0 instead of 10,000

improved: Dopri solver：Restored torchdiffeq odeint with method='dopri5'
FID evaluation：Added fid_score.py for proper evaluation
Uncoupled model：Better separation of dependent/uncoupled variants
Model wrapper for ODE：Proper ODE function wrapping for torchdiffeq

sota_table.agent: ML 博士号取得者（人間）

caveat: 94.5% は最も易しい論文1本（94 ノード）での結果。SOTA の数字は20論文平均なので、公平な比較ではない点に注意。
